title: How Dubai brands should think about WhatsApp marketing in 2026
notes: Cover: WhatsApp Business setup, click-to-WhatsApp Meta ads, template messages, segmentation, automation tools, real CPL benchmarks. ~95% of UAE mobile users have WhatsApp.

title: The Dubai influencer marketing trap (and how to avoid it)
notes: Argue against chasing macro influencers. Recommend tiered nano/micro structure. White-listed amplification, ROI measurement, contract structures.

title: Why your Dubai e-commerce store is leaking conversions on mobile
notes: Network conditions in UAE outside central Dubai, LCP/CLS impact on conversion, specific Shopify/Magento fixes, payment friction (Tabby/Postpay/Cash on Delivery patterns).

title: Meta Ads playbook for Dubai real estate developers in 2026
notes: Vertical-specific: how off-plan property campaigns differ from secondary market, lead-gen forms vs WhatsApp, Arabic vs English creative split, sales funnel timing.

title: The 2026 state of TikTok in the UAE (and what brands should do about it)
notes: Audience composition shifts, ad cost vs Meta, content formats winning, Snap as a complement, creator economy maturity.

title: Conversion rate optimisation for Dubai service businesses
notes: Salons, clinics, restaurants, services. Booking flow optimisation, social proof in UAE, WhatsApp vs forms, payment trust signals for Khaleeji audience.

title: How Dubai SMEs should structure their first AED 20,000/month marketing budget
notes: Concrete allocation: paid media, content, tools, agency vs in-house. The mistakes most SMEs make when scaling up from AED 5k/mo to AED 20k/mo.

title: The Arabic-only landing page test that lifted our client's CPL by 47%
notes: Case-study style. Anonymised real Dubai cosmetic clinic. Test methodology, layout differences, copy differences, what to copy and what not.
